productDisplayName: Baggit Women Karma Mayur Green Wallet
description: Worry no longer about managing money, cards and coins in your tote bag! Organise your everyday essentials into this stylish wallet from baggit. This three-fold timeless piece is on the top of our wishlist this year. A sophisticated addition to your accessory collection, you can carry this piece in your hand or pop it into your bag. Dimensions: 18 cm x 9 cm Crafted from genuine leatherette with a three-fold flap opening style Buckle detail on the upper and a magnetic button closure Printed branding on the back Press button closure inside the wallet to secure the first two folds Six card holders, one id card holder, two pockets and a key holder on the left fold Six card holders and a pocket on the centre fold A zippered compartment on the back Care Wipe with clean, damp cloth to remove dirt
